gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.execute.description: Patch VM instances by creating and running a patch job.

required.description: Required. The project in which to run this patch in the form `projects/*`

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.cancel.description: Cancel a patch job. The patch job must be active. Canceled patch jobs cannot be restarted.

required.description: Required. Name of the patch in the form `projects/*/patchJobs/*`

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.list, iterate response["patchJobs"][], extract item["name"] → fill {patchJobId}

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.get.description: Get the patch job. This can be used to track the progress of an ongoing patch job or review the details of completed jobs.

required.description: Required. Name of the patch in the form `projects/*/patchJobs/*`

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.list, iterate response["patchJobs"][], extract item["name"] → fill {patchJobId}

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.list.description: Get a list of patch jobs.

required.description: Required. In the form of `projects/*`

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchJobs.instance.description: Get a list of instance details for a given patch job.

required.description: Required. The parent for the instances are in the form of `projects/*/patchJobs/*`.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.r.description: Change state of patch deployment back to "ACTIVE". Patch deployment in active state continues to generate patch jobs.

required.description: Required. The resource name of the patch deployment in the form `projects/*/patchDeployments/*`.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.list, iterate response["patchDeployments"][], extract item["name"] → fill {patchDeploymentId}

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.p.description: Change state of patch deployment to "PAUSED". Patch deployment in paused state doesn't generate patch jobs.

required.description: Required. The resource name of the patch deployment in the form `projects/*/patchDeployments/*`.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.list, iterate response["patchDeployments"][], extract item["name"] → fill {patchDeploymentId}

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.g.description: Get an OS Config patch deployment.

required.description: Required. The resource name of the patch deployment in the form `projects/*/patchDeployments/*`.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.list, iterate response["patchDeployments"][], extract item["name"] → fill {patchDeploymentId}

gcp.osconfig.projects.patchDeployments.l.description: Get a page of OS Config patch deployments.

required.description: Required. The resource name of the parent in the form `projects/*`.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()
